g.title: ApplyGraphicOptionsText__186
g.text: SourceString = This mode is recommended if you are using Variable Refresh Rate, since it can cause issues when combined with dynamic resolution scaling.

g.title: ApplyGraphicOptionsText__690
g.text: SourceString = <Italic>Note: We recommend Manual Mode if you are using Variable Refresh Rate.</>

g.title: ApplyGraphicOptionsText__436
g.text: SourceString = <Bold>Manual:</> Lets you set a fixed Resolution Scale.

g.title: ApplyGraphicOptionsText__884
g.text: SourceString = <Bold>Performance:</> Targets <Bold>60 FPS</> while allowing the game to drop to a lower resolution than Fidelity Mode.

g.title: ApplyGraphicOptionsText__1072
g.text: SourceString = <Bold>Performance (120 Hz):</> Targets <Bold>120 FPS</> while allowing the game to drop to a lower resolution than Fidelity Mode. Only available if your TV supports 120 Hz.

g.title: ApplyGraphicOptionsText__1312
g.text: SourceString = <Bold>Fidelity:</> Targets <Bold>60 FPS</> while staying at or close to native resolution.
